_fixture_meta.label: positive_static_freeze_authority
_fixture_meta.notes: PayPal USD (PYUSD) on Solana. Token-2022 program. ACTIVE freeze authority: 2apBGMsS6ti9RyF5TwQTDswXBWskiJP2LD4cUEDqYJjk. Active mint authority: 8Jornc27vtAYPkwDzsZVgLQchAYyC8nD7aCNPCDV8Qk2. Score=1 (RugCheck whitelist). Demonstrates the freeze_authority_active signal fires on a real Token-2022 token. Expected: static signal fires at LOW confidence (~0.25) because freeze_authority is active. Simulation result expected: PASS (sells work for PYUSD). Note: confidence should be LOW not HIGH because (a) rugged=false, (b) jup_verified=true, (c) PYUSD is a legitimate stablecoin. Context mitigates the raw signal. Developer must implement context-aware confidence attenuation for known-verified tokens OR accept that static signal always fires and let scoring crate filter. Architect decision needed: see design gap note in 0004-detector-01-honeypot.md §Design Gaps.
